title: Thai Paneer Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful Thai-inspired dish made with paneer, vegetables, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic, ginger, and chili peppers, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the bell peppers and onions, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, and brown sugar, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the paneer and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
